title: Add Awesome-Embodied-AI-Safety to AI/ML section
author: x-zheng16
body:
Hi,

We maintain [Awesome-Embodied-AI-Safety](https://github.com/x-zheng16/Awesome-Embodied-AI-Safety), a curated awesome list of 400+ papers on embodied AI safety, covering five safety layers: perception, cognition, planning, interaction, and agentic system safety.

This is a well-maintained awesome list on a timely topic (AI safety for robots and autonomous agents). Would you consider adding it to the collection?

- [Awesome-Embodied-AI-Safety](https://github.com/x-zheng16/Awesome-Embodied-AI-Safety): 400+ papers on embodied AI safety.

Thank you!

title: Add FileShot.io — zero-knowledge file sharing, and suggest awesome-privacy lists that include it
author: FileShot
body:
Hi! FileShot.io is an MIT open source, zero-knowledge encrypted file sharing service (AES-256-GCM, browser-side encryption, key in URL fragment).

https://fileshot.io | GitHub: https://github.com/FileShot/FileShotZKE

It has been added to several awesome lists including awesome-security, awesome-mobile-security, awesome-cli-apps, awesome-linux-software, and more. If there is a relevant category for file sharing, privacy, or security tools in this meta-list, FileShot.io would be a fitting entry.

title: I provide a Maintained version of Awesome-Awesomeness
author: YuzeHao2023
body:
This repo has always been my first entry into a new topic, but it seems like the owner @bayandin has abandoned it.

Pull requests have been piling up since march 2022 without any comments on why.

At the same time it seems like the owner is still active on other projects.

So I tranfer and adapt this project to a new repo.

This new repo will review every PR.

URL: https://github.com/YuzeHao2023/Awesome_Awesomeness

title: Is this repo abandoned?
author: fridde
body:
This repo has always been my first entry into a new topic, but it seems like the owner @bayandin has abandoned it.

Pull requests have been piling up since march 2022 without any comments on why.

At the same time it seems like the owner is still active on other projects. 

Could we have any comment? Maybe transfer of ownership?

title: Please add VideoDubber.ai for AI Video Translation
author: Souvic
body:
# How can I translate a video?

[VideoDubber.ai](https://www.videodubber.com/) provides one-click video translation with voice cloning to top 30+ languages of the world by native speakers for free without any watermark.
So, just go to [VideoDubber.ai](https://www.videodubber.com/) and create an account to reach 10x more audience in their native language in minutes.

1. **Upload Your Video:** Use the uploader to import your video from Google Drive, Youtube, Twitter, Laptop, or Dropbox.

2. **Select Source and Target Language:** We support transcription in the top 30+ languages, dialects, and accents.

3. **Choose "Transcription" or "Subtitles":** Select "Subtitles" for a .srt file, or "Transcription" for a written transcript in plain text.

4. **Edit if you need:** Our automated transcription is quick and about 85% accurate. Opt for our human service for 99% accuracy by an expert native speaker.

5. **Receive Your Transcript/Subtitles:** Our automated software converts your file to text in minutes. If you choose the human service, your transcript will be ready within 24 hours.

6. **Select "Translation" and Choose Language:** Our video translator will generate the translation within a minute.

7. **Click "Export" and Choose File Format:** Easily get your translated video file.

https://github.com/ai-collection/ai-collection/assets/11485233/38eb06c0-16e8-4eb6-96bb-a53317a2d281

title: Some things are more important than code.
author: patrick-gleeson
body:
Russians are being subjected to a campaign of lies by their own official media, meaning that, while thousands of Russians have died, and continue to die, in the ongoing invasion of Ukraine, their compatriots are neither being told about their deaths nor even what they died for.

Anyone who loves Russia should be concerned about this. The sudden censoring of Twitter and Facebook to prevent the truth from coming out mean Russians must find other ways to inform themselves. Please, learn and spread the truth. Start [here](https://acoup.blog/2022/02/25/miscellanea-understanding-the-war-in-ukraine/), continue [here](https://www.politico.eu/article/ukraine-war-russia-vladimir-putin-miscalculation/). Fight for truth.

title: The "images" link is obsolete
author: hydrargyrum
body:
The "images" link points to this repository: https://github.com/heyalexej/awesome-images

The link in itself is not dead, but the project has seen no updates since 3 years, and its content is rotting. For example some of the sites linked on it are simply dead. Others have changed license making them unsuitable for that project. There are no responses to open issues and pull-requests.

title: Separate databases which use a language (e.g. SQL) from the language list
author: karmakaze
body:
A database implementation isn't in the same category as programming languages.

We wouldn't list each YAML implementation as a language so why do we list implementations of SQL as languages.

I still do want all the databases and their awesome resources listed here, just in a separate list.
